basics.name: James Chuong
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: A software engineer with 10+ years of experience at software startups in the Bay Area. Adept at working across multiple roles with a specialization in frontend development, currently building AI-powered products.

work.name: Syllable
highlights: Built the ActiumHealth demo site to showcase Syllable's voice agent platform following the acquisition

Co-developed Console, a self-service React/Next.js + Material UI application for the Zoon platform, enabling customers to configure AI agents, prompts, tools, and voices for inbound and outbound healthcare voice and chat workflows (appointment scheduling, prescriptions, billing)
Contributing to planning and prototyping for a next-generation agentic workflows platform (pre-alpha)

work.name: Actium Health
highlights: Built an internal ETL pipeline creation tool, validator, and viewer in Next.js, enabling rapid data onboarding for new customers
Led development from prototype to beta launch of a priority-driven calling application, onboarding two customers who responded positively
Delivered the Intelligent Campaigns application in React from scratch within 6 months, securing one new customer at launch

work.name: Automation Anywhere, Inc.
highlights: Led UI development for Discovery Bot, collaborating with product and UX designers and coordinating with the backend team
Developed interactive flowcharts with user editing capabilities in React as the centerpiece feature for Discovery Bot's GA launch
Drove the company-wide transition to TypeScript and established component standardization standards, with Discovery Bot components adopted in subsequent projects across the organization

work.name: Instart
work.description: CDN and web performance optimization platform
highlights: Built customer portal dashboard pages in React + Redux for real-time network utilization metrics
Refined React components for custom queries and data visualizations, improving overall UX
Integrated self-service UI workflows enabling customers to manage their own service configurations, reducing reliance on internal support

work.name: Instart
work.description: CDN and web performance optimization platform
highlights: Implemented and extended Netflix Lemur for certificate and key management, streamlining DevOps workflows and enabling customer self-service
Developed a C++ library integrating with HashiCorp Vault via REST API, enabling secure proxy initialization without locally stored secrets
Built Python tooling for managing infrastructure hardware (switches, servers, databases) via Device42
Automated global service deployments using Vault, Docker, Nomad, Kubernetes, Puppet, and Salt
